hero.title: Restore your inner glow.
hero.subtitle: Experience luxury skin treatments, massage, and facials. Strictly by appointment to guarantee your utmost privacy and relaxation.

about.title: An elevated, high-touch sanctuary in Ikoyi.
about.paragraph1: We believe that self-care is not just a luxury—it's an essential part of living your best life. Our treatments are meticulously designed to restore not just your skin, but your inner peace.
about.paragraph2: From our signature facials to our bespoke home services, every detail is orchestrated to provide an atmosphere of utmost relaxation and privacy.

services.title: Skin Treatments
services.description: Medical-grade rejuvenation and restorative therapies for radiant, healthy skin.

services.title: Massage Therapy
services.description: Release tension and find deep relaxation with our bespoke massage techniques.

services.title: Luxury Facials
services.description: Curated facial treatments using high-performance botanicals and advanced tech.

messages.name: Linda Ikeji
